name: Xero
highlight_text: Category: Best accounting-first platform with invoicing
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__Source: Xero

What Xero Does

Xero is an accounting-first software with invoicing features added in. It's perfect for agencies that need to manage VAT, payroll, and reconciliation alongside billing.

Key Features

  • Quotes & invoices (with online payments), bank feeds & reconciliation.
  • Capture bills and receipts with Hubdoc
  • Multi-currency on higher tiers; reporting & VAT (UK).

Pricing

  • Early: $20 
  • Growing: $47
  • Established: $80 

Pros

✅ Deep accounting + reliable invoice tooling; easy reconciliations.
✅ Broad ecosystem & payment integrations (e.g., Stripe/PayPal).

✅ Combines agency billing with full accounting & VAT.

Cons

🚫 Invoice UX/features not well reviewed vs specialist tools.

🚫 Limited tracking capabilities (only two custom fields)

🚫 May be restrictive for some companies

‍
what_people_say:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Customers Say

“I love how Xero automates… bank reconciliations and invoicing… dashboard gives me a clear view of real-time cash flows.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
